7200 Dorey Park Dr, Henrico, VA 23231, USA
Several apples in this area near the old dairy barn silo. One is bearing fruit. Access: Public.
Many briars on the South side if the VA Capital Trail, just west of Doran Rd. Access: Public.
Loads briars on the North side if the VA Capital Trail, just west of Doran Rd, under and to the sides of a trail bridge over a creek. Access: Public.
Many briars on the South side if the VA Capital Trail, near the Dorey Park sign. Access: Public.
Huge numbers of elderberry trees on either side of the VA Capital Trail, on the banks of a stream. Watch for poison ivy and flooded areas! Access: Public.
